Backend Engineer — Initech (San Jose, CA)

We are looking for a Backend Engineer to design and build the services that power
our analytics platform.

What you'll do:
- Design, build, and operate REST APIs and microservices
- Own PostgreSQL schema design and query performance
- Improve our CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation

Requirements:
- 2+ years of professional experience with Python
- Strong SQL and PostgreSQL experience
- Experience designing REST APIs

Nice to have:
- Docker and Kubernetes
- Streaming systems (Kafka)
- AWS
